metadata.topic: 4 存储/备份厂商防勒索误报算法 + 算力 + 权威白皮书链接深度调研
metadata.iron_rule: 每个算法描述 + 算力数字 + 性能指标均来自厂商官方技术 blog / 白皮书 / 第三方验证 (SE Labs, ESG, Forrester); 无编造内容
metadata.scope_note: 委托中 'Veeam 4 层堆叠 (stacked) 异常检测 — Signature + Heuristic + Behavioral + ML' 在官方 Ransomware Detection Service 白皮书中未找到对应 4 层术语. 本调研以 Veeam 官方白皮书所述 Random Cut Forest (RCF) + 双检测画像 (Fast/Extended Attack) + 多维行为基线 + SureBackup/SureReplica 为准, 并附 caveat. M-Trends dwell time 数据为 Mandiant 2024 报告, 由 Veeam 2025 Ransomware Trends 引用. Index Engines '53% ROI' 数字在公开可访问的 2023-08 Forrester TEI 主报告中未找到, 仅列出可验证的 75% downtime / 80% recovery time 数字.

netapp_arp_ai.product: ONTAP Autonomous Ransomware Protection with AI (ARP/AI) + ARP (classic)

core_algos.name: ARP-AI 多信号 ML 模型 (4 大检测信号)
signals: Entropy (熵) — 评估文件数据随机度, 用于 NAS + SAN
File extension deviation (文件扩展名偏离) — 用于 NAS
File IOPS burst + encryption (IOPS 突发 + 加密) — 用于 NAS (9.11.1+)
Encryption vs plaintext detection (加密 vs 明文识别) — ARP/AI 9.16.1 新增 header encryption 检测
core_algos.model: 多信号 + 持续云端训练的 ML 模型, on-box 内联推理 (inline, on-storage)
core_algos.training_data: 训练数据规模 1M+ 文件样本, 涵盖多种已知勒索攻击
core_algos.continuous_training: 云端持续训练 + 自动更新, 模型自动向存储控制器推送新参数

core_algos.name: ARP (classic) 启发式 + 统计模型

fp_suppression_mech: 管理员可在 ONTAP System Manager 将告警标记为 false positive, 触发 alert profile 更新, 不再对相同特征触发告警

FP suppression 原文: 'Marking an alert as a false positive updates the alert profile. For example, if the alert is triggered by a new file extension and you mark the alert as a false positive, you will not receive an alert the next time that the file extension is observed.' (NetApp Docs)
Multi-admin verification (MAV, 9.13.1+) 防止 ARP 配置被单管理员误改
ARP/AI 无学习期 (no learning mode), 持续云端训练直接避免冷启动基线偏差引起的 FP
netapp_arp_ai.compute_infra: NetApp storage controller 内 WAFL 写路径内联 (inline) 推理, 配合云端模型持续训练 + 自动参数下发

whitepapers.title: NetApp Autonomous Ransomware Protection Solution Brief (SB-4301)
NetApp ONTAP built-in on-box AI-based detection and response (Technical Report)

research_papers.title: SE Labs Independent Test Report — NetApp ONTAP ARP/AI (AAA, 99% recall, 100% precision)

veeam.product: Veeam Data Platform + Veeam Ransomware Detection Service (RDS)

core_algos.name: Random Cut Forest (RCF) 异常检测 (Amazon-developed)
core_algos.characteristics: 无需 labeled 训练数据, 持续从 streaming backup data 学习正常行为, 适合实时数据流
core_algos.deployment: per-user / per-protected-object 个性化模型 (granular), 多个模型并行

core_algos.name: Dual Detection Profiles (双检测画像)
profiles: Fast Attack Profile — 检测突发高强度加密事件 (blitz-style attacks)
Extended Attack Profile — 检测渐进式、慢速加密 (stealth / slow-moving attacks)

core_algos.name: Multi-Dimensional Behavior Baselines (多维度行为基线)
monitored_signals: Anomalous file modifications or deletion (异常文件修改/删除)
Suspect file extensions (可疑文件扩展名)
Unusual patterns in file data — entropy scores, file change rates (文件熵值异常、文件变动率异常)
Derived statistics only: 文件计数, 熵分数 — 隐私保留 (privacy-preserving), file content 永不入模

core_algos.name: SureBackup + SureReplica 自动恢复验证
core_algos.function: 通过 Virtual Lab + Instant VM Recovery 启动隔离环境, 对备份做 Content Scan (AV + YARA) 与 live recoverability test

fp_suppression_mech: Privacy-preserving architecture: 仅 derived statistics 入模, file content 留在 backup 系统中, 减少因内容侧特征导致的 FP
Per-object 个性化模型 + 持续 unsupervised learning: 减少 global model 误判
Human-Verified Threat Assessment: 人工核验告警后才升级 (Veeam Data Cloud Threat Center UI)
Ignore Anomaly 选项 (XSOAR 集成): 误报可在 SOAR 平台直接 'Ignore' 抑制后续告警
veeam.compute_infra: Veeam Data Cloud 内 ML 推理, 多用户/对象个性化模型; SureBackup/SureReplica 在 Veeam Virtual Lab 内的 backup repository + proxy appliance 算力上运行 (Instant VM Recovery 依赖底层 repository IOPS)

market_threat_context.source: Veeam 2025 Ransomware Trends and Proactive Strategies (survey of 1,300 orgs)
market_threat_context.stat: 69% of organizations experienced at least one ransomware incident in 2024/2025
market_threat_context.mandiant_dwell_time_ref: M-Trends 2024 — global median dwell time 10 days (down from 16 days). Mandiant red teams achieve objectives in 5–7 days. (Cited via Veeam 2025 Ransomware Trends report and Mandiant M-Trends 2024)

whitepapers.title: Veeam Ransomware Detection Service White Paper (Payam Kavousi & Zack Rossman, 2026)
Veeam Ransomware Resilience, Availability and Recovery (Data Protection Guide)

research_papers.title: Mandiant M-Trends 2024 Special Report (global median dwell time 10 days)

veeam.caveat: 原始委托中提到的 '4 层堆叠 (stacked) 异常检测 — Signature + Heuristic + Behavioral + ML' 未在 Veeam 官方 RDS 白皮书中找到对应 4 层术语. Veeam 官方方案实际为: RCF unsupervised ML + 双检测画像 (Fast/Extended) + 多维行为基线 + SureBackup/SureReplica 恢复验证. 委托方描述与官方术语不一致, 以官方白皮书为准.

cohesity.product: Cohesity Data Cloud (DataHawk 已并入 Data Cloud Enterprise Edition)

core_algos.name: Cohesity-developed 多 ML 模型 (Multivariate, Stacked-Ensemble 风格)
core_algos.characteristics: Multiple Cohesity-developed ML models; 多元 (multivariate) 而非传统 AI-washing; 由 human-written heuristic rules + ML 联合判断 (ensemble with associated weightage)

core_algos.name: Entropy / Data-Reduction Ratio Anomaly Detection
core_algos.method: 利用 backup 自身的数据缩减 (dedup+compression) 链路观察 entropy 突变 — 加密后数据可压缩性骤降, 表现为高熵, 无需额外算力

core_algos.name: ML 输入信号 (Cohesity feeds into ML)
signals: Content info per backup: size of data written, size of data read, logical size
Entropy / data-reduction ratio per backup (post dedup & compression)
Change tracking per backup: # files added, # files deleted, # files updated, # files unchanged
Aggregated stats across multiple backups: max data written bytes, max source logical size bytes, # successful runs
core_algos.min_history_required: minimum 15 valid historical records to trigger detection

core_algos.name: Human-written Heuristic Rule (FP suppression)
core_algos.example: If data is compressible AND replacement files are equally compressible, unlikely crypto attack — used to remove false positives

fp_suppression_mech: ML + human-written heuristics 联合 ensemble (避免单 ML 模型的 FP)
需要 minimum 15 historical records 才有判断 (避免冷启动 FP)
Anomaly alert 可被标记 'Ignore Anomaly' — 抑制该 object 后续 30 天告警 (Cohesity Helios / AntiRansomware Dashboard)
SOAR 集成: Palo Alto XSOAR / Cisco SecureX 支持 'Ignore' 闭环处置
cohesity.compute_infra: Cohesity Data Cloud control plane (Helios) 中跑 ML 推理; 训练数据来自集群 + 已知 malware 训练集; 推理为 scale-out SaaS

whitepapers.title: Accelerate Anomaly Detection with Cohesity (White Paper v1.1, Feb 2025)
Counter Ransomware Attacks with Cohesity (Solution Brief)
Cohesity DataHawk Solution Overview (folded into Data Cloud Enterprise Edition)

research_papers.title: A Lightweight Stacked Ensemble Model for Efficient Ransomware Detection (academic reference, IoT)

index_engines.vendor: Index Engines (delivered via Dell PowerProtect Cyber Recovery)
index_engines.product: CyberSense® for Dell PowerProtect Cyber Recovery

core_algos.name: Full-Content AI Analytics (CyberSense 引擎)
core_algos.scope: 在 backup image 内部直接扫描, 无需 rehydrate (支持 Dell Avamar, NetWorker, Commvault, NetBackup, PowerProtect Data Manager)

core_algos.name: AI 训练集规模 (Index Engines Research Lab)
core_algos.scale: 7,500+ ransomware variants analyzed, 120M+ customer datasets collected, patented training approach
core_algos.training_data: actual ransomware variants + sophisticated intermittent encryption variants + tens of millions of data sets

fp_suppression_mech: Full-content AI analysis (vs metadata-only) — metadata 层面 (扩展名/size) 易被攻击者绕过, CyberSense 走 full-content 避免 metadata-级误报
YARA 规则 + 自定义 malware signatures 支持 forward & backward detection
自定义 threshold alerts (基于 files changed/added/deleted 的基线)
Vault 内运行 (air-gapped) — 不在主链路, 不受主存储 I/O 抖动影响, 减少环境因素 FP
index_engines.compute_infra: 运行在 Dell PowerProtect Cyber Recovery Vault 内 (air-gapped cyber vault), 与主链路物理隔离; 100% full-content inspection, 不采样

validated_accuracy.validator: Enterprise Strategy Group (ESG) — Senior Analyst Alex Arcilla
validated_accuracy.report_title: Index Engines' CyberSense Validated 99.99% Effective in Detecting Ransomware Corruption

forrester_tei_metrics.study_title: The Total Economic Impact Of Dell PowerProtect Cyber Recovery

verified_metrics.reduction_in_data_recovery_time: 80% (data protection teams spent 80% less time locating uncompromised data and restoring)
verified_metrics.reduction_in_system_downtime: 75% (systems back online 75% faster with PowerProtect + CyberSense vs without)

forrester_tei_metrics.unverified_metric_note: 委托方提供的 '53% ROI' 数字在公开可访问的 2023-08 Forrester TEI of Dell PowerProtect Cyber Recovery 主报告中未找到对应具体数字, 可能引用自其他版本或 composite organization 量化模型; 本调研仅列出公开可验证的 80% recovery time / 75% downtime 数字

whitepapers.title: CyberSense® for Dell PowerProtect Cyber Recovery — Solution Brief
ESG: Index Engines' CyberSense Validated 99.99% Effective (Research Brief)
Dell PowerProtect Cyber Recovery Forrester TEI Study (2023-08)
